query:
UPDATE detected_swaps
                SET deposit_balance_change_id = $1,
                    deposit_receipt_id = $2
                WHERE id = (
                    SELECT id FROM detected_swaps
                    WHERE account_id = $3
                      AND deposit_balance_change_id IS NULL
                      AND sent_token_id = $4
                      AND block_height >= $5
                    ORDER BY block_height ASC, id ASC
                    LIMIT 1
                )
